mapper.select: select usage_ko as usage ,caution_ko as caution from tb_product_type where prod_cd = #{prodCd}

select a.item_cd ,b.item_name ,c.member_nm as managerName ,a.bom_ver ,(select count(item_cd) from tb_bom_recipe where bom_id = a.bom_id) as itemCnt ,dbo.getCommonName('approval_state', a.approval_state) as approval_state ,a.etc ,a.bom_id ,a.default_yn ,b.unit ,b.item_type_cd from tb_bom_mst a inner join tb_item_mst b on a.item_cd = b.item_cd left outer join tb_users c on c.user_id = a.manager_id where 1=1
and a.default_yn = #{defaultYn}
and b.item_name like '%' + #{itemName} + '%'
and a.item_cd like '%' + #{itemCd} + '%'
AND c.member_nm LIKE '%' + #{managerName} + '%'
AND b.item_type_cd =#{itemTypeCd}
order by a.item_cd , a.bom_ver desc

select a.item_cd ,b.item_name ,dbo.getClientName(a.client_id) as clientName ,dbo.getUserName(a.manager_id) as managerName ,a.approval_state ,a.lab_no ,a.prod_type ,a.etc ,a.caution ,a.usage ,a.significant ,a.note ,a.manager_id ,a.bom_ver ,a.qty ,a.bom_id from tb_bom_mst a inner join tb_item_mst b on a.item_cd = b.item_cd where a.bom_id = #{bomId} and a.default_yn ='Y'

select a.order_dist ,a.phase ,a.item_cd as realItemCd ,dbo.getItemName(a.item_cd) as realItemName ,a.real_content ,a.item_cd as stdItemCd ,dbo.getItemName(a.item_cd) as stdItemName ,isnull(a.std_content, a.real_content) as std_content ,a.etc ,a.qty ,a.bom_id ,a.bom_item_id from tb_bom_recipe a where bom_id = #{bomId} order by a.phase, a.order_dist
select a.order_dist ,a.phase ,a.proc_type ,a.mat_proc ,a.h ,a.p ,a.d1 ,a.d2 ,a.t ,a.m ,a.p2 ,a.rt ,a.etc ,a.bom_proc_id ,a.bom_id from tb_bom_proc a where a.bom_id = #{bomId} order by a.order_dist
mapper.insert: INSERT into tb_bom_mst (bom_id, bom_ver, item_cd, client_id, manager_id, lab_no, prod_type, usage, caution , significant, note, qty, approval_state, etc, default_yn, reg_id, upd_id) VALUES (#{bomId}, (select convert(nvarchar(10), getdate(), 23)) ,#{itemCd}, #{clientId}, #{managerId}, #{labNo}, #{prodType}, #{usage}, #{caution},#{significant},#{note},isnull(#{qty}, 0),#{approvalState},#{etc}, 'Y', #{userId}, #{userId})

insert into tb_bom_recipe (bom_item_id,bom_id, phase, item_cd, real_content, qty, etc, order_dist, reg_id, upd_id) values (#{bomItemId}, #{bomId}, #{phase}, #{realItemCd},#{realContent} #{qty},#{etc},#{orderDist}, #{userId}, #{userId})

insert into tb_bom_proc (bom_proc_id, bom_id, phase, proc_type, mat_proc, h, p ,d1 ,d2 ,t , m, p2, rt, etc , order_dist, reg_id, upd_id) values (#{bomProcId}, #{bomId}, #{phase}, #{procType}, #{matProc}, #{h}, #{p},#{d1},#{d2},#{t},#{m},#{p2},#{rt},#{etc},#{orderDist}, #{userId}, #{userId})
mapper.select: select prod_ko_name as prodTypeName ,isnull(prod_en_name, '') as enProdTypeName ,isnull(efficacy_ko, '') as krEffect ,isnull(efficacy_en, '') as enEffect ,isnull(usage_ko, '') as krUsage ,isnull(usage_en, '') as enUsage ,isnull(menual_ko, '') as krUse ,isnull(menual_en, '') as enUse ,isnull(caution_ko, '') as krCaution ,isnull(caution_en, '') as enCaution ,isnull(craftiness_ko, '') as krCraftiness ,isnull(craftiness_en, '') as enCraftiness from tb_product_type where (prod_ko_name = #{prodTypeName} or prod_en_name = #{prodTypeName})

select a.itemCd ,a.item_name ,a.bomVer ,a.realContent ,a.bomId ,a.qty ,a.recipeQty from ( select a.bom_id as bomId ,dbo.getItemName(a.item_cd) as item_name ,a.bom_ver as bomVer ,b.real_content as realContent ,a.item_cd as itemCd ,a.qty ,b.qty as recipeQty from tb_bom_mst a inner join ( select bom_id, item_cd ,real_content, qty from tb_bom_recipe where item_cd = #{itemCd} ) b on b.bom_id = a.bom_id where a.default_yn ='Y' and (a.item_cd != '삭제' and a.item_cd is not null) ) a where a.item_name is not null

select a.item_cd ,b.item_name ,c.member_nm as managerName ,a.bom_ver ,(select count(item_cd) from tb_bom_recipe where bom_id = a.bom_id) as itemCnt ,dbo.getCommonName('approval_state', a.approval_state) as approval_state ,a.etc ,a.bom_id ,a.default_yn ,b.unit from tb_bom_mst a inner join tb_item_mst b on a.item_cd = b.item_cd left outer join tb_users c on c.user_id = a.manager_id where 1=1 and a.default_yn = 'Y'
and b.itemName like '%' + #{itemName} + '%'
and a.item_cd like '%' + #{itemCd} + '%'
AND c.member_nm LIKE '%' + #{managerName} + '%'
AND b.item_type_cd = #{itemTypeCd}
AND b.item_type_cd in ('M0', 'M5', 'M6')
order by a.item_cd , a.bom_ver desc

select b.order_dist ,b.phase ,b.proc_type ,b.mat_proc ,b.h ,b.p ,b.d1 ,b.d2 ,b.t ,b.m ,b.p2 ,b.rt ,a.significant ,a.note ,a.bom_id ,a.item_cd ,a.bom_ver from tb_bom_mst a inner join tb_bom_proc b on b.bom_id = a.bom_id where a.default_yn ='Y' and a.item_cd = #{itemCd} order by b.order_dist
